title: Custom AI Chatbot Development

heroSubtitle: Deploy intelligent AI assistants that understand your business and serve your customers 24/7.
introduction: I build custom ChatGPT-style chatbots trained on your specific business knowledge. These aren't generic bots—they understand your products, policies, and processes to deliver accurate, helpful responses that feel like talking to your best employee.

benefits.title: 24/7 Customer Support
benefits.description: Your AI chatbot handles inquiries around the clock, reducing support tickets by 60-80% while maintaining customer satisfaction.

benefits.title: Trained on Your Data
benefits.description: Unlike generic chatbots, yours knows your products, pricing, policies, and processes—giving accurate, brand-aligned responses.

benefits.title: Seamless Handoff
benefits.description: Complex issues automatically escalate to human agents with full conversation context, so customers never repeat themselves.

services.name: Customer Support Chatbots

services.name: Sales Assistant Bots

services.name: Multi-Channel Deployment

cta.title: Ready to Build Your AI Chatbot?
cta.description: Let's discuss your use case and design a custom AI assistant that transforms how you serve customers.

faqs.question: How is a custom AI chatbot different from ChatGPT?
faqs.answer: ChatGPT is a general-purpose AI with no knowledge of your business. A custom chatbot is trained on your specific data—product catalogs, support docs, pricing, policies—so it gives accurate, relevant answers about YOUR business. It's like having an employee who's memorized everything about your company.

faqs.question: What data can the chatbot be trained on?
faqs.answer: Any text-based business content: knowledge bases, FAQs, product documentation, support tickets, sales scripts, policies, training materials, and more. I can also connect to live data sources like your CRM, inventory system, or order database for real-time information.

faqs.question: How do you ensure the chatbot doesn't give wrong answers?
faqs.answer: I implement multiple safeguards: restricting responses to your verified knowledge base, confidence thresholds that trigger human handoff, regular testing against real customer questions, and conversation monitoring dashboards. The bot is also designed to say 'I don't know' rather than hallucinate.

faqs.question: Can the chatbot integrate with our existing tools?
faqs.answer: Yes. I build integrations with CRMs (Salesforce, HubSpot), helpdesk platforms (Zendesk, Intercom), e-commerce systems, scheduling tools, and custom databases. Your chatbot can look up orders, check availability, create tickets, and more.
